briefdescription.para: 256 bytes size of first prime factor(P)
256 bytes size of first prime factor(Q)
This function authenticates boot image located in DDR using RSA-4096 algorithm.

detaileddescription.para: The decrypted hash is matched against the calculated boot image hash. The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XSecure_Rsa driver.

simplesect.para:
- ErrorCode if RSA authentication is failed
XST_SUCCESS if RSA authentication is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function does the RSA CRT test.

simplesect.para:
- ErrorCode if RSA authentication is failed
XST_SUCCESS if RSA authentication is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function does the RSA private encryption using pre-calculated modulus.

simplesect.para:
- ErrorCode if RSA authentication is failed
XST_SUCCESS if RSA authentication is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function does RSA public encryption.

simplesect.para:
- ErrorCode if RSA encryption is failed
XST_SUCCESS if RSA encryption is successful.

briefdescription.para: This example illustrates the usage of RSA APIs to encrypt or decrypt the signature.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the boot image authentication is successful.
ErrorCode if the boot image authentication Failed.
